MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Gary Stilson; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Bruns is present.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Steve Portaro is present.
Attorney, Kathryn Edwards, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement for the premises located at 1961 Jefferson Street, #7, San Francisco, CA (Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action With Prejudice), which was NOT FILED.

This case did settle. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 is vacated.
